action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline ResNet-50 with class-weighted CE achieved test balanced accuracy 0.6574. Few-shot accuracy 0.5061 lags behind many-shot 0.7774. Analysis: Simple class weighting insufficient; need stronger augmentation, balanced sampling, and decoupled classifier training to boost tail classes. Decision: Implement balanced sampler (WeightedRandomSampler), mixup (alpha=0.2), TrivialAugmentWide augmentation, and a two-phase training: (1) 30 epochs with balanced sampler + mixup, (2) freeze backbone, retrain classifier 10 epochs with effective class weights. Evaluate after training.
